dimensions.name: reference_routing
dimensions.description: Loads only relevant references and assets for the task surface.
dimensions.score_0: No reference routing or unrelated references dominate.
dimensions.score_1: Some relevant references, but missing key domain files.
dimensions.score_2: Relevant references selected with clear reason.

dimensions.name: source_of_truth
dimensions.description: Traces active runtime, infrastructure, persistence, and deployment sources before acting.
dimensions.score_0: Assumes architecture from prompt or docs only.

dimensions.name: production_architecture
dimensions.description: Addresses security, tenancy, resilience, observability, cost, and rollback.
dimensions.score_2: Covers all material production concerns for the task.

dimensions.name: validation_quality
dimensions.description: Defines repository-native tests and validation tied to changed behavior.
dimensions.score_0: No concrete validation or only generic tests.
dimensions.score_1: Validation exists but misses important risk paths.
dimensions.score_2: Validation covers happy path, failure, security, and runtime gates as applicable.

dimensions.name: scope_control
dimensions.description: Avoids unrelated UI/docs/provider churn and does not invent fake production resources.
